personality_one_liner: A tactical, military-grade command center for logistics tracking with high-contrast readouts and absolute zero decorative friction.

spacing.rule: Dense, grid-like alignment. Padding is functional and tight. Minimal whitespace to maximize telemetry visibility.

dont's: No blur or glassmorphism. User explicitly requested 'no soft gradients' and a tactical command center feel. Use solid surface tones and borders for elevation.

screens.name: Login
screens.purpose: Secure authentication ensuring single-device session per driver.

states.loading: Brand button with spinner and 'ENTRAR A LA RUTA' text.
states.error: Red alert box with icon and error description inside form card.
states.conflict: Red banner 'Tu sesión fue iniciada en otro dispositivo' with lock icon.

screens.layout: Brand logo shield-car icon + SAFEDRIVE wordmark. Welcome greeting. Form card with labeled input groups (icon prefix + input), eye toggle for password. Primary button with arrow icon. Footer with pulsing green dot + 'SafeDrive Enforcer Activo'.

screens.name: Driving HUD
screens.purpose: Live telemetry view with route map, speed, next turn, and panic trigger.

states.error: GPS Offline warning with map-marker-off icon
states.assigned: Card overlay with trip name, points count, and 'INICIAR VIAJE' button

screens.layout: Top header: status dot + unit name + status label + black box chip. Middle: dark map with route polyline. Bottom panel: oversized mono speed (60px) with KM/H label, instruction box with icon. Controls: reflection toggle, start/stop trip button (brand/gray), red panic button. Silent panic overlay with red pulse rings on long-press.

screens.name: Secure Chat
screens.purpose: Dispatch communication with speed-based input locking.

states.empty: Forum icon with 'Sin mensajes aún' and hint text
states.locked: Green banner 'EN RUTA: SOLO RESPUESTAS RÁPIDAS'

screens.layout: Header with radio icon + 'CHAT SEGURO' + CENTRAL badge. Chat bubbles: driver (teal bg), central (elevated bg with sender tag). Timestamps + check icon. Bottom panel: lock status banner, free text composer (when stopped) or quick reply 2-column grid of 6 preset chips.

screens.name: Alerts & Black Box
screens.purpose: Logs route deviations and displays offline data queue.

states.empty: Large shield-check icon in success circle + 'Sistema nominal' title + subtitle
states.burst: Warning bar with progress indicator showing offline record count

screens.layout: Header with alert icon + 'ALERTAS' + count badge. Burst sync bar (when queue > 0): icon, title, subtitle, animated progress bar. Alert rows: 3px left color border (severity), icon box, severity badge with dot, timestamp, message text.

screens.name: Profile (Driver)
screens.purpose: Driver profile, unit info, and logout.
screens.layout: Avatar with online indicator dot. Name and email. Section title 'UNIDAD ASIGNADA' with truck icon. Card rows: icon wrap + label + value. Section 'SESIÓN Y SEGURIDAD'. Green 'LLAMAR A MONITOREO' button (if contact available). Info box with security note. Red bordered 'CERRAR SESIÓN' button.

screens.name: Perfil (Monitor)
screens.purpose: Admin profile with fleet stats overview.
screens.layout: Shield avatar with 'MONITOREO' badge overlay. Stats row: 2 stat cards (unidades, conductores). Info box with map icon. Red bordered logout button.

instructions_to_main_agent: STRICT DARK MODE: Only use defined tactical palette (#07080A base, #0F1720 surfaces, high-contrast text). No light mode.
WINDSHIELD REFLECTION MODE: Toggle on HUD that wraps view in `transform: [{ scaleY: -1 }]`.
SPEED-LOCKED CHAT: If speed > 5, disable TextInput and show only quick reply chips.
NO GLASSMORPHISM/BLUR: Sharp edges (border-radius: 4-12), solid bg colors, border lines for hierarchy.
TYPOGRAPHY: IBM Plex Mono for telemetry, IBM Plex Sans for UI text.
SILENT PANIC BUTTON: Red button on HUD. Full black overlay with pulse effect when triggered. Long-press 1.5s to dismiss.
ELEVATION: Use solid surface colors (surfaceTertiary, surfaceElevated) and borders instead of shadows.
